title: We Can Source It Ltd 50 x 750ml Plastic Microwave & Freezer Safe Food Containers with Lids - BPA-Free, Reusable, Takeaway Meal Prep Containers - Catering Grade Food Storage Boxes for Home & Business
features: 𝐌𝐈𝐂𝐑𝐎𝐖𝐀𝐕𝐄 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐄𝐙𝐄𝐑 𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄: Store, reheat, or freeze meals with these food containers. Suitable for meal prep, work lunches, or leftovers. Safe for microwaves and freezers, ensuring durability for hot and cold food storage. Stackable for easy storage.

𝐀𝐈𝐑𝐓𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐊𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐎𝐅 𝐋𝐈𝐃𝐒: Secure, leak-resistant lids keep food fresh and prevent mishaps during transport for refrigerator storage, workplace lunches, and takeout. Both dry and moist foods stay fresh when stored in reusable containers.

𝐑𝐄𝐔𝐒𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐇𝐖𝐀𝐒𝐇𝐄𝐑 𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄: These BPA-free plastic containers are safe for dishwashers, making cleaning easy. Reusable design ensures sustainability while saving time and space in the kitchen. Great for everyday use at home, work, or school.

𝐒𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐄-𝐒𝐀𝐕𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐂𝐊𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: Stack these food containers neatly to save fridge and cupboard space. Perfect for busy kitchens, meal prep, or catering. The compact design makes them convenient for travel, picnics, or BBQs.

𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐀𝐍𝐘 𝐎𝐂𝐂𝐀𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍: Ideal for meal prep, lunches, takeaways, and catering events. Store leftovers, salads, sandwiches, and snacks. Use at home, work, picnics, or parties. Designed to meet all food storage needs with convenience and reliability.

Microwave & Freezer Safe Food Containers with Lids Merchant video Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Are these containers safe to use in the microwave? Yes, these containers are microwave safe and designed to handle hot food, making reheating meals quick and convenient. Can I use these containers in the freezer? Absolutely. The durable plastic construction is freezer safe and ideal for long-term cold storage without cracking or warping. Are the containers reusable and dishwasher safe? These containers are built for multiple uses and are dishwasher safe for easy, hassle-free cleaning. Do the lids prevent leaks? Yes, the snap-on lids are designed to create a tight seal, preventing spills and keeping both dry and moist foods secure during transport or storage. Is the plastic food-safe and BPA-free? Yes, the containers are made from BPA-free plastic, ensuring they are safe for storing all types of food.

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Dishwasher, microwave, freezer safe. Hand wash recommended.
